props.headline: Turn Your Audience Into a Premium Business
props.subheadline: Raptive is the ad management partner for the world's most independent creators. Join 6,500+ sites earning more every month.

features.title: Premium Ad Revenue
features.description: Access top-tier programmatic demand and direct brand partnerships that consistently outperform generic ad networks.

features.title: Creator-First Support
features.description: Dedicated account managers who know your niche. Real humans, real advice — no bots, no tickets.

features.title: Data-Driven Growth
features.description: Proprietary analytics surface what content earns most and help you make smarter publishing decisions.

features.title: Lightning-Fast Ads
features.description: Our ad tech is optimized for Core Web Vitals. Fast-loading ads mean higher RPMs and better search rankings.

quotes.text: Switching to Raptive was the single best business decision I made. My RPM jumped 40% in the first month.
quotes.author: Sarah K.

quotes.text: They treat you like a business partner, not just a number. The support team is genuinely incredible.
quotes.author: Marcus T.

quotes.text: I finally feel like my content is working as hard as I am. Revenue is predictable and growing.
quotes.author: Jessica L.

props.sliderPrompt: How many monthly pageviews does your site get?
